query: What usually affects the final home birthday quote most?
direct_answer: For Porch & Party, at-home celebration setups start at $300+. The final quote depends on the age group, focal areas being styled, materials, timing, and how full the setup needs to feel.
best_for: This page is for parents and family members trying to understand whether an in-home birthday setup fits the budget before requesting a quote.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
